scripts.content:validate: bun run validate-content.ts && bun run validate-course-registry.ts
scripts.content:images:check: export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$PWD/../../node_modules/@img/sharp-libvips-linux-x64/lib${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:+:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH}"; export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$PWD/../../node_modules/@img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64/lib${DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH:+:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH}"; NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" node validate-image-compatibility.ts
scripts.images:sync: export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$PWD/../../node_modules/@img/sharp-libvips-linux-x64/lib${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:+:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH}"; export DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH="$PWD/../../node_modules/@img/sharp-libvips-darwin-arm64/lib${DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH:+:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH}"; NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env --env-file-if-exists=../../.env.local sync-images.ts
